idea-plugin.name: Compose Hot Reload
idea-plugin.description:
Hot reload for debuggable Jetpack Compose Android apps from Android Studio or IntelliJ IDEA.

The bundled hotreload CLI runs one watch session for the selected device and reports its status in the IDE. Configure it under Settings | Tools | Compose Hot Reload: review Refresh discovery, save an explicit configured profile, run matching Doctor/prepare, then Start and wait for Ready.

Configured Gradle-plugin integration is the stable path. Zero-touch and live literals are experimental.

action.description: Start or stop the Compose hot reload watch session
